title: How Michael Rosen Stole Poopmas
description:
On a very much related note, I think I've about convinced Michael Rosen to stop filing copyright claims. Maybe.

You're welcome, internet.

Every pooper on YouTube was just having a laugh,
Making Mr Rosen seem really quite daft.
They made him say things that were most obscene,
Things so vile they'd make you turn green.
"What harm?" They said, it's all in good fun,
Until Michael Rosen sent them all for a run.

Mr Rosen, you see,
Was not as kind as you or me,
When he saw our poops, he got quite angry
"I'll show them", he thought in his head,
"When I'm done with them, all their poops will be dead!"

So what Rosen did, thinking he was not to blame,
He went to the videos, and all of them he did flame.
Saying mean, evil, hateful things,
Hoping the end of these poops it would bring!
However, as he saw to his much dismay,
These videos were clearly here to stay!

"This is horrible!" Rosen yelled out loud,
"All these videos are horrible, how are they even allowed?"
He said while watching the videos with a frown,
"I must find a way to get these videos taken down!"

For Rosen knew these videos would not cease,
Like a raging rabies infested beast.
The poopers would poop until their pooplers were sore,
And once they did that, they'd poop some more!

Oh the pooping! The pooping!
If there's one thing that sent him loopy it was all the POOPING POOPING POOPING!
"For years and years, I've put up with it now,"
"I've got to stop these poops soon, but how?!"

And then Rosen got an idea, an awful idea!
Mr Rosen got a wonderful, awful idea!
"I'll use copyright, that'll take them down, eh?"
So he filed hundreds of DMCAs!

The videos went down, falling like flies,
As Mr Rosen thought, with a sneer in his eyes:
"That'll show the poopers, they'll never poop again!"
Still filing copyright claims, while cackling like a hen.

But then Mr Rosen, while laughing some more,
Received an email by a pooper called SupDawg444.
It said "Mr Rosen, what are these tricks?"
So Mr Rosen thought up a lie, and he thought it up quick.

"You don't understand my boy, it's for all the kids!"
He said, while thinking up more fibs.
"I can't have small children seeing 'The Michael Rosen Rape'!"
He shouted triumphically, while planning his escape.
Then he patted little SupDawg on his cute little head,
Winked at him and told him to go to bed.

Once he was done, Mr Rosen sat back,
Waiting for the poopers to notice his attack.
He waited patiently, listening out,
Just waiting for all the poopers to pout.

"Oh no!" They'd shout, with a tear in their eye:
"Our poops, they've been blown sky high!"
And then they would all cry cry cry!

Mr Rosen chuckled, while brewing a stew,
He only had one thing left to do.
He waited, waited and waited some more,
Anticipating this more than anything ever before.

Then finally, the time was here,
All the poopers found what was causing Rosen's cheer.
Their videos were gone, each and every one,
Mr Ros
local_file: videos\SupDawg444\How Michael Rosen Stole Poopmas - GQxdc9kOSgw.mp4
